title: Preserved Real Rose Gift Box with I Love You Necklace, Handmade Eternal Rose Flower Gifts for Mum Mother Women Wife Girlfriend Her on Mothers Day, Birthday, Anniversary, Valentines Day, Christmas
features: 【100% Handmade Preserved Real Rose】：Each rose is made of real rose and processed by special technology.If properly maintained, it can maintain its vividness and beauty for at least one year or more. Let this rose always be with you, and always remind you of romantic love and harmonious and close relationships.

【Rose Gifts for Her】：Eternal rose means eternal and true love.It is a romantic way to show love for girlfriend, wife, mother, grandma, and sweetie.Also,Also,as an exquisite gift,it is a best choice on Birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas, and Anniversary.

【See "I LOVE YOU "in 100 Languages】：Put the pendant in front of your one eye closely,you'll be surprised to see "I LOVE YOU " in 100 languages.Or turn on the camera of your mobile phone and align the convex surface of the pendant with the lens, and you can see the contents of the pendant from the mobile phone screen.

【Tips】：In order to prevent the product from being scratched or leaving fingerprints,we plasticized a layer of plastic film on the product. After receiving the product, please open this layer of plastic film to get a better viewing experience of Eternal Rose.

【Packaging and Service】：The exquisite gift box comes with rose and necklace, accompanied by a greeting card and packing bag.It is convenient for you to write your message on the greeting card. After receiving the goods, you can put the gift box into the packing bag and send it to the person without additional packaging.If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Gift for Christmas, Birthday, Mothers Day, Valentines, Home Decor
